query:
UPDATE jobs
                SET title = ?1,
                    description = ?2,
                    url = ?3,
                    budget = ?4,
                    tags = ?5,
                    raw = ?6,
                    remote = ?7,
                    rating = ?8,
                    content_hash = ?9,
                    updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
                WHERE id = ?10
